suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align API-down console-error expectations across artifacts: keep the AGENTS clarification that browser-level ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED/Failed-to-fetch is expected when API is intentionally offline, and update feature wording to avoid contradictory validator outcomes.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Rerun review for stats-grid-error-states found features metadata still says 'No JavaScript console errors when API is down' while mission AGENTS explicitly exempts browser-level network errors.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Resolve skill-name mapping mismatch by standardizing feature `skillName` values to invokable names (or adding alias support) for `frontend-ui-worker`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: All layout-chart implementation transcripts reviewed in this round still show `frontend-ui-worker` lookup failures with fallback to `frontend-worker`.

rejectedObservations.observation: Repeated skill-name mismatch reports across multiple feature reviews.
Hardcoded color usage in layout components.
rejectedObservations.reason: already represented as a non-blocking code review issue; no factual services/library state update required in scrutiny synthesis.
